landmarks.visibleText: CHAPITÔ · A CASA · A HORTA · OS MOLHOS · ONDE PROVAR · LOJA · CONTACTO · EST. 2018 · LISBOA

Hero Sunburst Medallion · X-Marquee Band · Highlighter-Tape Manifesto · PIRI-PIRI Color Block · DOCE FOGO Color Block · EQUILIBRISTA Color Block + Chip-Tag Cluster · CABEÇUDO Color Block · TRAPÉZIO Big-Dark Bottle Hero · Medallion Footer
VISITA A LOJA · VAI ATÉ LÁ →

sections.childTextSnippet: Hero — sunburst alternating-ray pattern on chapito-cravo ground. Center: Bodoni circular wordmark medallion (CHAPITÔ top, MOLHOS FEITOS À MÃO bottom, large monogrammatic C with circumflex tent-peak above) on chapito-cal. 6 hand-painted bottle illustrations arranged at clock positions 12/2/4/6/8/10 around the medallion. Top-left ticket-stub tag: PIRI-PIRI label with B&W cutout, rotated -6°. Top-right ticket-stub tag: EQUILIBRISTA label with B&W cutout, rotated +6°.

X-Marquee Band — two diagonally-crossed white-tape ribbons spanning edge-to-edge, intersecting in the center. Ribbon 1 (rotated -12°) repeats 'VEM AO CHAPITÔ' in Anton condensed all-caps with · separators. Ribbon 2 (rotated +12°) repeats 'PROVA A CASA'. At the X-intersection: 180px circular CTA button on chapito-tejo ground with VAI À LOJA in chapito-cal.

Highlighter-Tape Manifesto — centered free-running paragraph in Inter on chapito-cravo ground. Five phrase-spans wrapped in hard-edged solid-color highlighter rectangles in rotation: azulejo · piri · galinha · malagueta · tejo (white text on tejo). Below: a mono-marker CTA button ▸ DESCARREGA O CATÁLOGO COMPLETO.

PIRI-PIRI — chapito-piri ground (vivid orange). Anton 80px all-caps family name top-center. 3-term mono subtitle ALTERNATIVOS | ORIGINAIS | 100% NATURAIS. 6 bottles in a horizontal row middle. 4 B&W cutout-photo overlays floating at -8° / +5° / -3° / +9°. Diagonal-stripe accent bottom-right (cream + laranja-doce). Polka-dot accent bottom-left (azulejo on areia).

DOCE FOGO — chapito-galinha ground (mustard). Family name + 3-term mono subtitle JOVENS | SAUDÁVEIS | 100% NATURAIS. 6 bottles horizontal row. 4 cutouts. Bottom corners: stripe + polka-dot accents (cyan polka-dots on areia, stripe in cream + piri).

EQUILIBRISTA / FERMENTADOS — chapito-cravo ground with cyan-overlay band. Family name + 3-term mono subtitle IRREVERENTES | FERMENTADOS | 100% NATURAIS. 6 bottles horizontal row. 3 cutouts (sparser than other sections). + Chip-tag cluster: 6 circular cutout-photo chips with colored half-band labels (EQUILIBRISTA, FAQUIR, PALHAÇO, FUNÂMBULO, DOMADOR, MALABARISTA), loosely overlapping at -4° to +6°. Bottom corners: stripe + polka-dot accents.

CABEÇUDO — chapito-tejo ground (deep teal, light type on dark). Family name in chapito-cal + 3-term mono subtitle EXPERIMENTAIS | SAZONAIS | 100% NATURAIS. 6 bottles horizontal row. 4 cutouts. Bottom corners: stripe (cream + cyan) + polka-dot (malagueta dots on areia).

Big-Dark Bottle Hero — chapito-tejo full-bleed 80vh. Centered: 480px-tall Trapézio bottle. Behind: 3 hand-drawn parallel sine-wave lines in chapito-cal 2px stroke (Tagus at dusk motif). Left of bottle: Anton 120px TRAPÉZIO in cal + raster script lockup stamp below. Right of bottle: 3-line mono micro-block LARGO DO CHAFARIZ · COSTA DO CASTELO · ALFAMA, LISBOA. Below the bottle: italic Inter pull-anchor 'O molho de assinatura. Trapézio sobre malagueta.'

Medallion Footer — centered 200×200px wordmark medallion (same construction as hero, smaller). Below: 4 icon-links in a single row (email · Instagram · WhatsApp · phone), each rendered as a small mono icon + mono uppercase label.
Persistent Bottom Bar — fixed bottom 36px chapito-cal band. Left: mono uppercase VISITA A LOJA →. Right: mono uppercase VAI ATÉ LÁ → (links to chapito.shop).

cardinalFlashRule: no single token over-deployed; chapito-tejo appears in two consecutive sections (CABEÇUDO family + Trapézio bottle hero) to deliver the cover-of-night beat
